caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, grey sculpted hairstyle and glasses sits in a podcast studio. He wears a white dress shirt, a small red bow tie, and tan suspenders. He is wearing over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous small, framed photographs. On-screen graphics appear on both sides of the man, featuring a logo with a microphone and the text "PODCAST" below "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the clip, the man remains in a seated position, speaking while gesturing slightly with his hand in some frames. The setting remains constant, with the man as the sole subject, focused on the conversation as he looks slightly off-camera.
